info.name: E-Commerce API Complete
info.description: Comprehensive test collection for the SEF E-commerce API. All routes use /api/ prefix. Features: auto-saved tokens & IDs, filter params, error test cases, and all endpoint variations. Variables: base_url, token, product_id, order_id, user_id, review_id.

request.description: Exchanges the HttpOnly refresh cookie for a new access token. The browser sends the cookie automatically.
Admin only. Changes a user's role to 'admin' or 'customer'. Cannot change your own role.

formdata.value: A great laptop with massive specs

request.description: Available coupons: SAVE10 (10%), SAVE20 (20%), SAVE50 (50%), SAVE80 (80%), OFF50 ($50 fixed)
Valid transitions: pending→confirmed/cancelled, confirmed→processing/cancelled, processing→shipped/cancelled, shipped→delivered, delivered→returned
Use an expired/invalid token. Should return 401
Should return 400 - validation error on ID format

item.name: Add to Cart - Out of Stock

request.description: Should return 400 if cart is empty
Should return 400 if order is not pending/confirmed
Login as customer first. Should return 403 - Not authorized
Should return 400 - Cannot change own role (use your own user_id)
Should return 400 if order is pending (must go pending→confirmed first)
